source_name: NF PAC certified product directory (marque NF, Certita)
purpose: Attach French NF PAC certification references to the FR catalogue (derived from the German BAFA registry). User policy 2026-07-07: references are shown ONLY on confident matches — uncertain matches are never displayed; no eligibility claims (MaPrimeRenov'/CEE are criteria-based).

probe_2026_07_07.marque-nf.com: HTTP 200 (WordPress front; robots.txt allows / , disallows /en/). Certified-product search UI location and any export/API not yet identified.
probe_2026_07_07.certita.fr: connection failed from this network (HTTP 000) — retry needed
probe_2026_07_07.conclusion: Feasibility investigation (search UI structure, export format, terms of use) is a manual follow-up before any fetch script is written. Do not scrape without a terms review.

integration_ready.builder: scripts/fr/build-app-products-fr.mjs consumes data_sources/nf_pac/matching/YYYY-MM/fr-nfpac-matches.json when present ({ matches: [{ bafa_id, nf_pac_reference }] })
integration_ready.ui: Data sheet renders 'Reference NF PAC' field only when nf_pac_reference is set
integration_ready.matching_policy: When data exists, reuse the conservative brand-gated token-sequence matcher family (scripts/ofgem/, scripts/bafa/) — multi-candidate only with identical values, never plain substring.

next_recommended_step: Manual (post-work backlog): locate the NF PAC certified-product search/export on marque-nf.com or certita.fr, review terms of use, then write fetch/parse/match scripts mirroring the ofgem pipeline discipline.
